name: Forem
description: Forem — Open-source community platform software powering dev.to with posts, follows, and reactions.

seo.title: Forem — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Forem: Forem — Open-source community platform software powering dev.to with posts, follows, and reactions.

when_to_use: Self-hosted developer community powered by the same engine as Dev.to
Company engineering blog with community reactions and follows
Open-source project discussion hub with topic tagging
DevRel owned community with full API control
Technical community replacing a managed forum platform

pros: Tags, follows, and reactions out of the box
cons: Slower feature velocity than SaaS rivals
Steep setup curve for small teams
review.verdict: Solid OSS foundation for a dev-focused community, but only if you can staff the ops.
review.best_for: Engineering-led teams wanting a self-hosted dev.to-style community with full control.
review.not_for: Non-technical teams or anyone wanting a managed, zero-ops community platform.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
